name: input-edit-char-movzx
desc: Diagnostic-only patch for the LOGH VII MBCS edit-widget character validator. FUN_004fff60 sign-extends the single input byte before CRT/MBCS classification (`movsx eax, byte ptr [esi]`). Change it to zero-extension to test whether CP949 high bytes are being rejected before insertion. This does not solve DBCS pair assembly or WM_IME_CHAR routing by itself and must not enter DEFAULT_STACK without live proof.
verified: Raw bytes verified against canonical playable 98ca installed EXE: VA 0x004fff65/file 0x000fff65 = 0fbe06. Same-length 3-byte diagnostic replacement only.

patches.note: FUN_004fff60: `movsx eax, byte ptr [esi]` -> `movzx eax, byte ptr [esi]` for high-byte character validation diagnostics.
